name: The Ultimate Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Coarsely chopped pecans or walnuts
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cream Crisco and brown sugar in a large bowl at medium speed for 2 minutes, or until light. Add egg, milk, and vanilla, beating 1 minute, or until thoroughly blended. Combine flour, salt, and baking soda. Gradually add to creamed mixture on low speed, beating 1 minute, or until just blended. Stir in chocolate chips and pecans (or walnuts). Drop dough by heaping tablespoonfuls (2 tablespoons) onto an ungreased baking sheet. Bake 6 to 9 cookies at a time, leaving about 3 inches between each cookie for spreading. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes. Cookies will still appear moist when baked. Cool 2 minutes before removing from the baking sheet to a cooling rack.
